problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
mechanism: Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue
hypothesis: Combining Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
